headline: 8 deployed BUIDL token contracts catalogued across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Optimism, Polygon, Aptos, Solana, and BNB Chain; 1 core token contract per chain

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search on Ethereum surfaces primary BUIDL token contract at 0x7712c34205737192402172409a8F7ccef8aA2AEc (verified source code)

Official BlackRock press releases and Securitize announcements list deployed contract addresses for each blockchain: Ethereum (0x7712c34205737192402172409a8F7ccef8aA2AEc), Arbitrum (0xA6525Ae43eDCd03dC08E775774dCAbd3bb925872), Avalanche (0x53FC82f14F009009b440a706e31c9021E1196A2F), Aptos (0x4de5876d8a8e2be7af6af9f3ca94d9e4fafb24b5f4a5848078d8eb08f08e808a), Optimism (0xa1CDAb15bBA75a80dF4089CaFbA013e376957cF5), Polygon (0x2893Ef551B6dD69F661Ac00F11D93E5Dc5Dc0e99), and Solana (GyWgeqpy5GueU2YbkE8xqUeVEokCMMCEeUrfbtMw6phr)
BUIDL deployed across 8 chains as confirmed by multiple official announcements (Nov 2024 multi-chain expansion and March 2025 Solana launch)
All discovered addresses are token (ERC-20 on EVM chains, SPL on Solana) contracts representing the BUIDL share class on respective blockchains

rationale.verdict: Catalogued 8 confirmed token contract addresses across all stated chains via official BlackRock and Securitize press releases. BNB Chain deployment is confirmed as live (Nov 2025) but specific contract address not recovered from fetched sources. All discovered addresses are core token contracts serving as the primary entry point for BUIDL investors on each chain.

evidence.shows: Official press release from BlackRock/Securitize (Nov 13, 2024) announcing multi-chain expansion with token addresses for Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Optimism, Polygon, and Aptos
Ethereum block explorer confirms 0x7712c34205737192402172409a8f7ccef8aa2aec is verified BUIDL token contract with source code submitted 2024-03-04
Official Securitize press release (March 25, 2025) confirms Solana BUIDL share class launch with token address GyWgeqpy5GueU2YbkE8xqUeVEokCMMCEeUrfbtMw6phr and management fee of 20 bps
Wormhole blog (Nov 14, 2025) announces BUIDL expansion to BNB Chain (9 total chains now) with Wormhole interoperability; specific contract address for BNB Chain not provided in this source
Securitize official press page confirming Solana deployment with 7 blockchain availability as of March 25, 2025 (Aptos, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Solana)

unknowns: D1: BNB Chain contract address not discovered from official sources fetched; BNB Chain deployment confirmed as live (Nov 14, 2025) but specific contract not recovered
D6: BUIDL is not a factory-based protocol; it is a single token contract with multiple share classes deployed per chain; no child enumeration required

protocol_metadata.about: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) is a tokenized money market fund issued by BlackRock Financial Management, Inc. and tokenized by Securitize. It provides qualified investors with access to U.S. dollar yields through blockchain-based token transfers backed by U.S. Treasury bills, cash, and repurchase agreements. BUIDL operates with institutional-grade custody (BNY Mellon) and compliance, deployed across 8 major blockchain networks with daily dividend payouts and 24/7/365 peer-to-peer transfer capability.
